name: From Intent to Infrastructure: LLM-Driven Agent Compilers for ISAC Networks
summary: arXiv:2607.16269v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Integrated sensing and communications (ISAC) is moving from proof-of-concept demonstrations to system-level deployment in sixth-generation (6G) net...
description: arXiv:2607.16269v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Integrated sensing and communications (ISAC) is moving from proof-of-concept demonstrations to system-level deployment in sixth-generation (6G) networks. Because sensing and communication share hardware, spectrum, and waveform resources, ISAC design now involves many tightly coupled choices, including waveform selection, sensing algorithm setup,...
author: Lijie Zheng, Xudong Zhong, Baoquan Ren, Xiangwu Gong, Xinghui Zhu, Ji He
